detail: No se pudieron actualizar las protecciones. Si existen protecciones previas creadas manualmente o por otro usuario, borralas una sola vez desde Google Sheets y vuelve a correr el pipeline. Detalle original: <HttpError 400 when requesting https://sheets.googleapis.com/v4/spreadsheets/1fuxVbDn75myR-lfRigrR80oDevE6W_M23h7q2dnQ5xE:batchUpdate?alt=json returned "Invalid requests[0].deleteProtectedRange: You are trying to edit a protected cell or object. Please contact the spreadsheet owner to remove protection if you need to edit.". Details: "Invalid requests[0].deleteProtectedRange: You are trying to edit a protected cell or object.
